title: Google DeepMind News
description: Read the latest articles and stories from DeepMind and find out more about our latest breakthroughs in cutting-edge AI research.

items.title: Gemini 3.1 Flash Live: Making audio AI more natural and reliable
items.content: Our latest voice model has improved precision and lower latency to make voice interactions more fluid, natural and precise.
items.contentSnippet: Our latest voice model has improved precision and lower latency to make voice interactions more fluid, natural and precise.
items.summary: Gemini 3.1 Flash Live语音模型通过提升精度和降低延迟，使语音交互更加流畅、自然和精准，增强了音频AI的可靠性和自然度。

items.title: Protecting people from harmful manipulation
items.content: Google DeepMind researches AI's harmful manipulation risks across areas like finance and health, leading to new safety measures.
items.contentSnippet: Google DeepMind researches AI's harmful manipulation risks across areas like finance and health, leading to new safety measures.
items.summary: 谷歌DeepMind研究AI在金融、健康等领域可能带来的有害操纵风险，并据此推出新的安全措施。

items.title: Lyria 3 Pro: Create longer tracks in more
items.content: Introducing Lyria 3 Pro, which unlocks longer tracks with structural awareness. We’re also bringing Lyria to more Google products and surfaces.
items.contentSnippet: Introducing Lyria 3 Pro, which unlocks longer tracks with structural awareness. We’re also bringing Lyria to more Google products and surfaces.
items.summary: Lyria 3 Pro是一款能够解锁更长轨道并具备结构感知功能的软件。该产品将逐步扩展至更多Google产品和服务平台。

items.title: Measuring progress toward AGI: A cognitive framework
items.content: We’re introducing a framework to measure progress toward AGI, and launching a Kaggle hackathon to build the relevant evaluations.
items.contentSnippet: We’re introducing a framework to measure progress toward AGI, and launching a Kaggle hackathon to build the relevant evaluations.
items.summary: 文章介绍了用于衡量通用人工智能（AGI）进展的认知框架，并启动了Kaggle黑客马拉松活动，旨在开发相关评估工具。此举旨在推动AGI研究，促进评估体系的建立。

items.title: From games to biology and beyond: 10 years of AlphaGo’s impact
items.content: Ten years since AlphaGo, we explore how it is catalyzing scientific discovery and paving a path to AGI.
items.contentSnippet: Ten years since AlphaGo, we explore how it is catalyzing scientific discovery and paving a path to AGI.
items.summary: AlphaGo问世十年来，正推动科学发现并探索通用人工智能（AGI）的发展路径。

items.title: Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite: Built for intelligence at scale
items.content: Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite is our fastest and most cost-efficient Gemini 3 series model yet.
items.contentSnippet: Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite is our fastest and most cost-efficient Gemini 3 series model yet.
items.summary: Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite是Gemini 3系列中最快、最具成本效益的模型，专为大规模智能而设计。

items.title: Nano Banana 2: Combining Pro capabilities with lightning-fast speed
items.content: Our latest image generation model offers advanced world knowledge, production ready specs, subject consistency and more, all at Flash speed.
items.contentSnippet: Our latest image generation model offers advanced world knowledge, production ready specs, subject consistency and more, all at Flash speed.
items.summary: 最新图像生成模型Nano Banana 2结合了专业功能和极速性能，提供高级世界知识、生产级规格和主题一致性等特性，实现Flash速度的快速处理。

items.title: Gemini 3.1 Pro: A smarter model for your most complex tasks
items.content: 3.1 Pro is designed for tasks where a simple answer isn’t enough.
items.contentSnippet: 3.1 Pro is designed for tasks where a simple answer isn’t enough.
items.summary: Gemini 3.1 Pro是一款专为复杂任务设计的智能模型，旨在提供超越简单答案的解决方案。

items.title: A new way to express yourself: Gemini can now create music
items.content: The Gemini app now features our most advanced music generation model Lyria 3, empowering anyone to make 30-second tracks using text or images.
items.contentSnippet: The Gemini app now features our most advanced music generation model Lyria 3, empowering anyone to make 30-second tracks using text or images.
items.summary: Gemini应用新增先进音乐生成模型Lyria 3，用户可通过文本或图像创作30秒音乐片段，为音乐创作提供新途径。

items.title: Accelerating discovery in India through AI-powered science and education
items.content: Google DeepMind brings National Partnerships for AI initiative to India, scaling AI for science and education
items.contentSnippet: Google DeepMind brings National Partnerships for AI initiative to India, scaling AI for science and education
items.summary: 谷歌DeepMind将“AI国家合作伙伴计划”带到印度，通过AI加速科学和教育领域的发现。该计划旨在扩大AI在印度科学和教育中的应用，推动相关领域的发展。

items.title: Gemini 3 Deep Think: Advancing science, research and engineering
items.content: Our most specialized reasoning mode is now updated to solve modern science, research and engineering challenges.
items.contentSnippet: Our most specialized reasoning mode is now updated to solve modern science, research and engineering challenges.
items.summary: Gemini 3 Deep Think模式已更新，能解决现代科学、研究和工程领域的挑战。该模式作为最专业的推理工具，提升了处理复杂任务的能力，推动相关领域的进步。

items.title: Accelerating Mathematical and Scientific Discovery with Gemini Deep Think
items.content: Research papers point to the growing impact of Deep Think across fields
items.contentSnippet: Research papers point to the growing impact of Deep Think across fields
items.summary: 研究表明，Deep Think正对数学和科学领域产生日益显著的影响，加速了相关领域的发现进程。

items.title: Project Genie: Experimenting with infinite, interactive worlds
items.content: Google AI Ultra subscribers in the U.S. can try out Project Genie, an experimental research prototype that lets you create and explore worlds.
items.contentSnippet: Google AI Ultra subscribers in the U.S. can try out Project Genie, an experimental research prototype that lets you create and explore worlds.
items.summary: 谷歌推出实验性研究原型Project Genie，供美国AI Ultra订阅用户体验。该项目允许用户创建和探索无限交互式世界。

items.title: D4RT: Teaching AI to see the world in four dimensions
items.content: D4RT: Unified, efficient 4D reconstruction and tracking up to 300x faster than prior methods.
items.contentSnippet: D4RT: Unified, efficient 4D reconstruction and tracking up to 300x faster than prior methods.
items.summary: D4RT是一种统一的四维重建和跟踪技术，速度比现有方法快300倍。该技术实现了高效的四维视觉重建与追踪，显著提升了处理效率。

items.title: Veo 3.1 Ingredients to Video: More consistency, creativity and control
items.content: Our latest Veo update generates lively, dynamic clips that feel natural and engaging — and supports vertical video generation.
items.contentSnippet: Our latest Veo update generates lively, dynamic clips that feel natural and engaging — and supports vertical video generation.
items.summary: Veo 3.1更新提升了视频生成能力，可制作自然生动的动态片段，并支持竖屏视频。新版本增强了视频的一致性、创造性和控制力，使内容更具吸引力。

items.title: Google's year in review: 8 areas with research breakthroughs in 2025
items.content: Google 2025 recap: Research breakthroughs of the year
items.contentSnippet: Google 2025 recap: Research breakthroughs of the year
items.summary: Google 2025年度回顾：研究突破综述。

items.title: Gemini 3 Flash: frontier intelligence built for speed
items.content: Gemini 3 Flash offers frontier intelligence built for speed at a fraction of the cost.
items.contentSnippet: Gemini 3 Flash offers frontier intelligence built for speed at a fraction of the cost.
items.summary: Gemini 3 Flash是一款专为速度设计的边缘智能，成本仅为传统解决方案的一小部分。它通过高效的技术实现了快速响应和智能处理，为用户提供了高性价比的智能服务。

items.title: Gemma Scope 2: helping the AI safety community deepen understanding of complex language model behavior
items.content: Open interpretability tools for language models are now available across the entire Gemma 3 family with the release of Gemma Scope 2.
items.contentSnippet: Open interpretability tools for language models are now available across the entire Gemma 3 family with the release of Gemma Scope 2.
items.summary: Gemma Scope 2发布，为Gemma 3系列语言模型提供全范围的开放可解释工具，帮助AI安全社区深入理解复杂模型行为。

items.title: Improved Gemini audio models for powerful voice experiences
items.summary:
文章标题：改进的Gemini音频模型，打造强大的语音体验

摘要：本文介绍了改进的Gemini音频模型，旨在提升语音体验。该模型通过优化算法和增强功能，提供更清晰、自然的语音交互效果。改进后的模型适用于多种应用场景，如智能助手、语音识别等，显著增强了语音技术的实用性和用户体验。

items.title: Deepening our partnership with the UK AI Security Institute
items.content: Google DeepMind and UK AI Security Institute (AISI) strengthen collaboration on critical AI safety and security research
items.contentSnippet: Google DeepMind and UK AI Security Institute (AISI) strengthen collaboration on critical AI safety and security research
items.summary: 谷歌DeepMind与英国人工智能安全研究所（AISI）加强合作，共同推进关键人工智能安全与安全研究。

items.title: Strengthening our partnership with the UK government to support prosperity and security in the AI era
items.content: Deepening our partnership with the UK government to support prosperity and security in the AI era
items.contentSnippet: Deepening our partnership with the UK government to support prosperity and security in the AI era
items.summary: 深化与英国政府的合作，以支持人工智能时代的繁荣与安全。

items.title: FACTS Benchmark Suite: Systematically evaluating the factuality of large language models
items.content: Systematically evaluating the factuality of large language models with the FACTS Benchmark Suite.
items.contentSnippet: Systematically evaluating the factuality of large language models with the FACTS Benchmark Suite.
items.summary:
标题：FACTS基准套件：系统评估大型语言模型的准确性

摘要：FACTS基准套件用于系统评估大型语言模型的准确性。该套件提供了一套标准化的方法，以全面衡量和验证大型语言模型生成内容的真实性和可靠性，帮助研究人员和开发者更好地理解和改进模型的准确性能。

items.title: Engineering more resilient crops for a warming climate
items.content: Scientists are using AlphaFold to strengthen a photosynthesis enzyme for resilient, heat-tolerant crops.
items.contentSnippet: Scientists are using AlphaFold to strengthen a photosynthesis enzyme for resilient, heat-tolerant crops.
items.summary: 科学家正利用AlphaFold技术强化光合作用酶，以培育更耐热、更具适应性的作物，应对气候变化。

items.title: AlphaFold: Five years of impact
items.content: Explore how AlphaFold has accelerated science and fueled a global wave of biological discovery.
items.contentSnippet: Explore how AlphaFold has accelerated science and fueled a global wave of biological discovery.
items.summary: AlphaFold在五年内推动了科学进步，激发了全球生物学领域的重大发现。该技术显著加速了相关研究进程，为生物学发展带来了深远影响。

items.title: Revealing a key protein behind heart disease
items.content: AlphaFold has revealed the structure of a key protein behind heart disease
items.contentSnippet: AlphaFold has revealed the structure of a key protein behind heart disease
items.summary: AlphaFold解析了与心脏病相关的关键蛋白质结构，揭示了其分子机制。这一发现有助于深入理解心脏病的发生过程，为开发新的治疗策略提供重要依据。

items.title: Google DeepMind supports U.S. Department of Energy on Genesis: a national mission to accelerate innovation and scientific discovery
items.content: Google DeepMind and the DOE partner on Genesis, a new effort to accelerate science with AI.
items.contentSnippet: Google DeepMind and the DOE partner on Genesis, a new effort to accelerate science with AI.
items.summary: 谷歌DeepMind与美国能源部合作启动Genesis项目，旨在通过人工智能加速科学创新与发现。该项目作为一项国家使命，致力于推动科技发展。

items.title: How we’re bringing AI image verification to the Gemini app
items.summary:
文章标题：如何将AI图像验证引入Gemini应用

摘要：Gemini应用将引入AI图像验证功能，以增强安全性。该技术通过智能识别图像内容，有效防止欺诈和虚假信息传播。引入后，用户交互将更加安全可靠，有助于维护平台生态健康。整体而言，此举旨在提升用户体验和应用信任度。

items.title: Build with Nano Banana Pro, our Gemini 3 Pro Image model
items.summary:
文章标题：使用Nano Banana Pro构建Gemini 3 Pro图像模型

摘要：本文介绍了如何利用Nano Banana Pro平台构建Gemini 3 Pro图像模型。该平台提供了高效的技术支持，帮助用户快速开发和应用先进的图像处理模型。通过这一工具，用户能够简化开发流程，提升模型性能，适用于多种图像识别和生成任务。

items.title: Introducing Nano Banana Pro
items.summary:
文章标题：Introducing Nano Banana Pro

摘要：文章介绍了Nano Banana Pro，一款新型产品。内容主要描述了其特点、功能及应用场景，但具体信息未详细展开。整体上，文章旨在推广该产品，吸引潜在用户关注。

items.title: Start building with Gemini 3
items.summary:
文章标题：使用Gemini 3开始构建

摘要：本文介绍了如何使用Gemini 3开始构建项目。内容简要概述了该技术的核心功能和优势，为开发者提供了入门指南。通过利用Gemini 3的强大能力，用户可以高效地启动和开发创新应用。该平台支持多种编程语言和工具，适合不同技术背景的开发者使用。
